[~. ~: itif~-6.:.l2037/55/99~l -~,Q'If-~ MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND IDGIIWAYS NOTIFicATION New Delhi, the lstJuly, 2009 ┬Ę s.o. t6tO(E).-In exercise of powers conferrea by Section SA of the National Highways . Act, 1956 {48 of 1956), th~ Central Government, for the services rendered by the Fekri Infrastructure Private Umited with registered office at 4th floor, Madhu Madhav Tower,. . . . Lakshmibhuvan Square, . Dharainpeth, Nagpur-440oio . (hereinafter . referred ┬Ęas┬Ę Concessionaire) .and having regard to expenditure involved in .building, maintenance, . . management and operation of the Surat-Dhule-Nagpur Section of National Highway No. 6 with approaches near village Fekari, Taluka Bhusawal, District Jalgaon in Km. 390/00 in the State of Maharashtra (hereinafter referred to as the said section of National Highway. ┬Ę No. 6) interest on capital invested, rea5onable return, th~ volume of traffic and the ┬Ę -┬Ę- ┬Ę- ŌĆó -------L __....__..,.,.! ;...., ŌĆóull┬Ęh t-ho rnnro~cinn~jrp_ hPrP.hV notifies -- 3 of 6 -- 4 THE GAZEITE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PAR:r II-SEC. 3.@1 that there shall be levied and collected fees on mechanical vehicles for the use of the said section of National Highway No. 6 at the rate specified in the Schedule annexed hereto and authorises the Concessionaire and its authorised legal representative to collect and retain the fees on and from the 4th July, 2009 {the scheduled project completion date) or publication of this notification in the Official Gazette, whichever is later, till the 13th September, 2021 (the last day of Concession Period). SCHEDULE (Rates offees to be recovered from the users ofthe said section of National Highway No.6) (1) (2) (3) - (4) (~) Motor Cycle, Motor Car, Taxi, Bus Truck, Tankers Heavy vehicle such as Scooter or ┬ĘJeep, Pick-up Van, and multi-axle truck-trailer - any other Station Wagon, vehicle without combination, ml,llti- two wheeler Tempo, other auto- articulation axle vehicle with mechanically driven light vehicle articulation other propelled with trailer mechanicallly vehicle propelled vehicle not mentioned above like mobile cranes dozers, earth movers, road rolers, containersr .:..:.ŌĆó ┬Ę-┬Ę┬Ę---┬Ę NIL Rs. 10 Rs. 25 Rs. 30 Rs. 40 Notes: 1. The fee set forth above shall be charged from the user of the said section of National Highway No. 6 for one way trip. 2. When a vehicle has to use the said section of National Highway No. 6 . more than once in a day, the. user shall at his option be entitled to do so on payment of one and half times the fee for one way trip in the first trip itself and a vehicle owner shall also be entitled to a monthly pass on payment of fee equal to thirty times the fee for one way trip. 3. Following vehicles are exempted from the fee specified above, namely :- (I) Defence vehicles; -- 4 of 6 -- I -4. ----- -┬Ę .... . . . . ┬Ę(ii) Vehicles with VIP symliols; '(iii) Police vehicles; (iv) Fire fighting vehicles; ┬Ę (v) Ambulances; .(vi) Funeral vans;┬Ę (vii) Post and Telegraphs Department vehicles; .. (viii) Central and State Government vehicle~ on duty; (ix) Agriculture vehicle like tractor including tractor traitor and tractor with empty ┬Ę trailer; (x) Auto rickshaw, three ┬Ęwheeler scooter or auto driven light vehicle without ┬Ę ~i~~ . The vehicles officially relating to the following shall be deemed to be vehicles .having VIP Symbols, namelyi- 1. ┬Ę President of India; ii. Vice-President of India; iii. Central and State Minister; ┬Ę iv. Leaders of Oppositions of Lok Sabha or Rajya Sabha or State Legislatures having the status of cabiner Minister while in the vehicle; . v. Governors of States; vi. Lieutenant Governors of Union territories; vii. Speakers or Chairmen of Central and State Legislatures; viii. Members of Pariiament possessing ID cards issued by the Parliament; ix.. Members of Legislative Assemblies or Legislative Councils within the State possessing of l. D. cards issue.d by the State Legislature or the Legislative Council; x. Foreign dignitaries on State visit to India, Foreign diplomats stationed in India using the car with CD ( car Diplomatic) symbols; xi. Executive Councillor of local elected bodies; 5. ./ -- 5 of 6 -- , 6 TifEGAZEITE OFINDIA:EXTRAORDINARY [PARrii~.3(ii)] xu. Winners o( gallantry awards namely Paramvir- Chakra, Ashok ; Chakra, Mahavir Chakra, Kirti Chakra, Vir Chakra and Shaurya Chakra possessing ID cards authenticating the awards by the competent authority. 5. The rates given in column (4) of the above Table are applicable for all Trucks and Tankers cif any weight; whether loaded or unloaded. 6. The above mentioned rates shall be conspicuously displayed at the toll plazas and also at a distance of 200 meters ahead of the toll plazas on either side of the said section of National Highway No.6. ' 7. The Concessionaire or its authorised legal representative shall give a receipt to the payer for the fee collected from the payer. (F_ No. NH-6-12037/55/99-MAH] PRABHAKAR, Dy. Secy. -- 6 of 6 --
